summary: CRITICAL: analyze_research.py overbook guard (BUG-122) will crash analyzer on thin-book markets. HIGH: BUG-115 fix incomplete — market_lay_price never populated, all lays use back-implied odds. Phase 1 NOT READY — executor.py has 3 blockers (back price for lays, no lay price refresh, non-atomic queue). 4 existing bugs upgraded to HIGH for live context (BUG-094, 097, 101, 117).

findings.description: Overbook guard at lines 182-185 inside estimate_probability_from_research() references undefined variables (event_name, market_name, signals, distribution_entries) and returns a 4-tuple where a 2-tuple is expected. Will crash analyzer with NameError on any thin-book market with >130% total back probability. Different from BUG-119.
findings.proposed_fix: Move overbook guard from estimate_probability_from_research() into analyze_market() where the referenced variables are in scope, OR pass them as parameters and fix return to (None, []).

findings.description: BUG-115 marked FIXED but market_lay_price is never set in analyze_research.py. Consumer sites in paper_tracker.py (lines 408, 501, 596) and notify.py (line 245) always get None. Every lay signal falls back to back-implied odds.
findings.proposed_fix: In analyze_research.py analyze_market(), when building the signal dict, read lay_price from the brief market runner data and set signal['market_lay_price'] = lay_price.

findings.description: execute_signal() line 331 computes decimal_odds from market_prob for all signals including lays. _get_live_back_odds() line 210 only reads availableToBack. Phase 1 lay orders would be submitted at back price.
findings.proposed_fix: Add availableToLay path to _get_live_back_odds(); use actual lay price for lay orders in execute_signal().

findings.description: kelly_pnl incremental update (line 150) adds flat P&L instead of Kelly-sized P&L. Diverges from paper_tracker._recompute_summary() full replay. Kelly balance is wrong between auto-resolution and next recompute.
findings.proposed_fix: Have check_resolutions import and call paper_tracker._recompute_summary() after resolution, or import paper_tracker.save_tracker().

findings.description: Stake floor at line 361 skips signals <£2.00. paper_tracker/notify round up to £2.00. Signals appear on slip in Phase 0 but would be silently dropped in Phase 1.
findings.proposed_fix: Align executor with paper_tracker: round sub-£2 Kelly stakes up to £2 instead of skipping.

findings.description: Non-atomic config.toml writes in executor._disable_live_mode (line 691), telegram_bot.do_holiday (line 824). Pi power loss mid-write truncates config.toml.
findings.proposed_fix: Use tempfile+os.replace pattern. Keep timestamped backup before edit.

findings.description: save_queue() at line 595 uses non-atomic open()+json.dump(). Phase 1 blocker — crash mid-write corrupts execution queue.
